log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Owlin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Owlin — Bardic Musician.
→ Owlin — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 20] FAIL! 31 necrotic damage. HP: 36/67
--- Owlin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Owlin — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:11+12=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 fire damage. Owlin — Bardic Musician HP: 21/67
--- Owlin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Owlin — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:14+12=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 fire damage. Owlin — Bardic Musician HP: 10/67
--- Owlin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Owlin — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Owlin — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:5+12=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 fire damage. Owlin — Bardic Musician HP: -7/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
